relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The elder writes to the chosen lady and her children in truth.
Truth remains in the community into the age.
Grace, mercy, and peace arrive in truth and love.
Joy rises when children walk in truth.
The beginning command remains: love one another.
Love walks according to the command.
Embodied Messiah confession becomes the test of teaching.
Guard the fruit of faithful work.
Remaining in Messiah’s teaching holds Father and Son.
Hospitality is not to empower harmful teaching.
Greeting can become participation when it endorses harm.
Paper and ink give way to face-to-face joy.
The chosen sister’s children send greeting.

contemplative_note: 2 John is truth-and-love with boundaries: love one another, remain in embodied Messiah teaching, and do not empower harmful teaching.
